title: IVR - KCR Train Pack
description: IVR - KCR Train Pack, contains KCRC Trains HD Model for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod
body:
![IVR - Integrated Train Pack Subpack Contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3ab98e9489ae6663bc48a8361b936fba2efe8a9.png) ![sp1900 on bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29e8c4f690ffabf6487359388aad353ef74b7609.jpeg)

**Overview** --- This pack main features KCR style or more style Trains in HD.
此高清材質包內含有：九廣鐵路-第三代電氣化列車 All trains contain textures in 3 levels of resolution.
所有列車皆包括1x,3x,5x材質解像度
**Before Download 下載須知** --- No modification and republish is allowed without the author's consent.
未經作者許可，禁止編輯及再發佈作品 Due to the file size is too large, please **JOIN** the discord channel to download the **LATEST** version (v2.0.0 or above).
由於檔案大小過大，加入Discord裡以獲得v2.0.0或以上的版本 **NTE Preload Optimisation** --- This resourcepack support NTE preload function, enable **NTE Preload** function to get smoother gameplay experience.
Please make sure NTE version is v.0.5.1 or above.
這材質包支持NTE預加載功能，可有效降低電腦效能負荷，NTE版本需要v.0.5.1或以上。
**IVR Packs** --- ![IVR PACK v8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4027e20f1283595bb8707fdc5de0867e234b477b_0.webp) **Train List 列車列表**： --- 1. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2001 2. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2002 3. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2004 (1) 4. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2004 (2) 5. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2005 6. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2007 7. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (East Rail/九廣東鐵) 2009 8. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (West Rail/九廣西鐵) 2003 9. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (West Rail/九廣西鐵) 2005 10. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (West Rail/九廣西鐵) 2009 11. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (Ma On Shan Rail/馬鞍山鐵路) 2004 12. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (Ma On Shan Rail/馬鞍山鐵路) 2005 13. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (Ma On Shan Rail/馬鞍山鐵路) 2007 14. KCR Millennium Train 世紀列車 (North-south Line/南北線) 2019
